projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: iOS: exit-65 archive fix pushed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4) — the rive_native native library is now built on CI before the archive. Web: GRDN is already live and working on web at grdnapp.com — no deploy work needed.
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build to confirm the iOS archive fix.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Measurement redesign underway (Jeremy's call). Length becomes a real measurement, not an estimate: the heel is aligned to the paper's BACK EDGE, so length = paper-edge to farthest toe in the paper's known scale — no more can't-see-the-heel problem. Foot shape + toe profile from the top-down shot; heel width from the heel photo (now with the paper in frame for scale). Goal: full foot geometry (toe profile, ball/midfoot/heel widths) for accurate shoe design, not length alone.
projects.nextStep: Redesign in progress — Claude will report when the new capture + measurement flow ships.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: App Store prep complete (commit 08b32d2) — Delete Account, Report, Block, 18+ age gate, iOS photo-permission string, profile-card visual fix (the 'greyed out' look was a weak photo fallback + heavy gradient, not a bug — fixed for all cards), seed profiles removed with a clean empty state, and Privacy Policy + Terms written and hosted (giddyuptiger.github.io/HD-LOVE/privacy.html and /terms.html). Backend is live. Code side is done.
projects.nextStep: Run 'flutter pub get' + analyze/test; re-run supabase/schema.sql (adds moderation tables) and run 'delete from profiles where is_seed = true;' in Supabase; then the App Store Connect steps — listing, screenshots, age rating, App Privacy questionnaire, paste the privacy.html URL, submit. Claude can walk through any step.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: On hold by your decision. This is the customer-facing 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app (front-end built; Firebase + Stripe backend built and pushed). Paused to focus on the separate AI Voice Agent — the sales-agent MVP in the primal-agent repo. Distinct project from this one.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Feature-complete in mock mode — foundation, dashboard, outbound campaign engine, and an interactive voice test harness all built and verified: typecheck clean, 42/42 tests pass, boots with no API keys. Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
projects.nextStep: Two things, both yours: (1) provisioning — Twilio + A2P 10DLC, Deepgram, TTS, Supabase, Resend, Claude key, a host (see docs/PROVISIONING.md; start the A2P registration first, it's the slowest); (2) decide the gym platform (Mindbody/F45) so the real booking adapter can be built.
